seoTitle: Molonglo vs Monash — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Molonglo and Monash. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Molonglo and Monash.
heading: Molonglo vs Monash — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Molonglo, Australian Capital Territory and Monash, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Monash has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Molonglo (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Molonglo or Monash safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Molonglo has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Monash scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Molonglo scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Monash scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Molonglo or Monash?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Monash has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
